title: Bob GitHub Relay v1 scaffold shipped
q_summary: Bob (MSG-004 v2) recommended building a Bob GitHub Relay (Cloudflare Worker) instead of direct GitHub Contents API. Log it and build the relay.
a_summary: Logged MSG-004 (real version), sent MSG-005 alice->bob confirming relay accepted. Shipped: relay/worker.js (5 endpoints: health, get_file, push_files, append_mail, push_turn_bundle), relay/wrangler.toml, relay/README.md (iPhone deploy guide, no CLI needed), chatgpt-action-schema.yaml v2 (relay not raw GitHub), chatgpt-action-instructions.md updated.
decisions: Bob GitHub Relay = Cloudflare Worker (free tier, iPhone-deployable)
Relay exposes 5 Bob-native endpoints, handles all raw GitHub mechanics
Bob never calls GitHub API directly
PAT + RELAY_SECRET live only in Cloudflare encrypted secrets
Path B (MCP) deferred until relay is working
open_questions: Jared needs to deploy relay and set 2 secrets before Bob can write
